title: September 30th, 2020 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - lyrics
            - i read a beat like you read a room
            - see what i wanna do, where i wanna be, with whom
            - scan for a minute then resume
            - dancing in it, that's my favorite tune
            - up until the moment that i leave the room
            - i don't need the room
            - got my own rhythm
            - i feed the room from what i've grown within
    - professional
